title: Uvaria musaria
taxonomy: Uvaria musaria belongs to the family Annonaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the custard-apple family. Uvaria musaria is a species within the genus Uvaria, which contains about 150 species of climbing plants. The genus Uvaria is part of the order Magnoliales, which is a group of flowering plants that are thought to be among the most ancient lineages of flowering plants. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships among different species within the Annonaceae family.

intro: Uvaria musaria, also known as the Asian Starfruit tree or simply Starfruit tree, is a plant species in the Annonaceae family, characterized by its unique star-shaped fruit.
